docsLlms.line: - 89 MCP tools — core orchestration + LiveGuard + Watcher + Crucible + Tempering + Bug Registry + Testbed + Lattice (code-graph, 5 tools) + Copilot Memory Sync (`forge_sync_memories`, `forge_sync_instructions`) + Worker Guardrails (`forge_diff_classify`). Start with `forge_capabilities` for full discovery; call `mcp-call <tool>` from the CLI for any tool without a dedicated wrapper.

rootLlms.line: - 89 MCP tools — core orchestration + LiveGuard + Watcher + Crucible + Tempering + Bug Registry + Testbed + Lattice (code-graph, 5 tools) + Copilot Memory Sync (`forge_sync_memories`, `forge_sync_instructions`) + Worker Guardrails (`forge_diff_classify`). Start with `forge_capabilities` for full discovery; call `mcp-call <tool>` from the CLI for any tool without a dedicated wrapper.
